messages.content:
A job that requires sitting at a desk and using a computer for many hours a day can lead to ________.


Select one:

sleep disorders


undesirable weight loss


formation of blood clots


inflammation of the gum tissue


reduce risk of type 2 diabetes
formation of blood clots

A key concept of good internal controls is the ________.


Select one:

combining of duties to prevent computer wastes


combining of duties to prevent computer mistakes


separation of duties to prevent collusion by employees


separation of duties to identify employees responsible for making computer mistakes


Non of the options are correct
separation of duties to prevent collusion by employees

Someone who coerces a government or organisation to advance his social objectives by launching computer-based attacks against computers and the information stored on them is called a ________.


Select one:

Hacker


Cyberterrorist


Cracker


Scammer


Identity thief
Cyberterrorist

In 2005, an American hacker was sent to jail after using a Trojan horse to break into innocent internet users' computers. A Trojan horse by definition is a ________.

Select one:

parasitic computer program that can create copies of itself on infected computer or send copies to other computers via a network


program that appears to be useful but purposefully does something user does not expect


modified version of a virus that is produced by virus’s author or another person


parasitic computer program that can create copies of itself on infected computer or send copies to other computers via a network
program that appears to be useful but purposefully does something user does not expect

A shipping container is equipped with cooling systems and packed with racks of servers, prewired for easy set up. This type of data center is known as a ________.

 


Select one:

traditional data center


modular data center


automated data center


green data center


None of the options provided are correct
modular data center
what is the capital of kwazulu natal province
The capital of KwaZulu-Natal province in South Africa is Pietermaritzburg.

As part of your practical work, you have been asked to create a table to store the test marks of students in ISTN101. The table includes the gender of each student and the last field in the table is the Final Mark, which is obtained by adding the Duly Performed (DP) mark and the exam marks, and then dividing by two. Use this information to answer the next three questions.

 
What data type will be the most appropriate for you to assign to the Final Mark field?


Select one:

Short text 


Long text


Yes/No


Calculated


Date/Time
Calculated

Which of the following about data cleansing and data validation is/are TRUE?



Data cleansing occurs mostly when data has already been entered into the database


Data validation prevents the entry of the wrong data into the database


Specifying a data type for each field is part of data validation

All three statements are true. 

- Data cleansing involves detecting and correcting or removing inaccurate, incomplete, irrelevant, or improperly formatted data from the database and usually occurs after data has already been entered into the database. 

- Data validation involves using rules to ensure that entered data meets certain specifications or constraints and prevent incorrect data from being entered into the database. 

- Specifying a data type for each field is part of data validation since it helps ensure that data entered into the field is of the appropriate format.

The manager sends an e-mail to two administrators to update the employee’s level of education for employee number “007”.  What method is used to prevent the record of employee number “007”  from being updated by both administrators at the same time?


Select one:

Concurrent Update


Simultaneous Update


Concurrency control


Multiple Update


Non-Multiple Update
Concurrency control

The commands used to access and report information from the database are part of the ________.



data definition language


data manipulation language


data normalisation language


schema


query-by-example
data manipulation language

Which of the following is a collection of databases storing information on all aspects of a business, such as a company’s processes, products, suppliers, and customers?



Big data


Replicated database 


Data mining


Data modelling


Data warehouse
Data warehouse

Filtering can be defined as the process that ________.  


Select one:

restricts the display of records to match criteria that the user specifies


uses specific criteria to delete one or more records from a database


changes the order in which records are displayed

ensures that the relationships between records in related tables are valid


None of the options provided are correct
restricts the display of records to match criteria that the user specifies.

Each component of a formula is called aNo ________.

Select one:

a.
operator

b.
modulator

c.
argument

d.
element

e.
reference
argument
